evals.prompt: How do I find all the email addresses at a company using Tomba?
evals.expected_output: Guide to using Domain Search with filters, pagination, and email verification

assertions.name: domain_search
assertions.description: Explains Domain Search — enter a domain to get all known emails with names, titles, departments, and confidence scores

assertions.name: filters
assertions.description: Recommends using department and seniority filters to narrow results to decision-makers

assertions.name: verification
assertions.description: Warns to verify found emails with Email Verifier before sending to keep bounce rate under 3%

evals.prompt: I need to verify 5,000 email addresses before launching a cold outbound campaign. Can I do this in bulk with Tomba?
evals.expected_output: Guide to bulk email verification including setup, async processing, and result interpretation

assertions.name: bulk_verification
assertions.description: Explains bulk verification — up to 10,000 emails per batch, asynchronous processing

assertions.name: webhook_callback
assertions.description: Recommends using webhook_url parameter for async completion notification instead of polling

assertions.name: result_statuses
assertions.description: Explains verification statuses (valid, invalid, accept_all, unknown) and what action to take for each

evals.prompt: I want to use the Tomba API to automatically enrich new leads in my CRM. How do I authenticate and what endpoints should I use?
evals.expected_output: API authentication guide and enrichment endpoint reference with integration recommendations

assertions.name: auth_method
assertions.description: Explains API key + secret authentication via X-Tomba-Key and X-Tomba-Secret headers

assertions.name: enrichment_endpoint
assertions.description: Points to GET /v1/enrich endpoint for email-based enrichment and describes the output fields

assertions.name: integration_approach
assertions.description: Suggests using Zapier or direct API integration for CRM enrichment, with credit-conscious filtering
